data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): SKILL.md must (1) detect RED tasks by checking subagent field for 'dso:red-test-writer' in TASK lines, (2) document how TEST_RESULT:rejected interacts with Phase 6 post-batch (not counted as dispatch failure), and (3) add Phase 5 conditional that routes RED-classified tasks to the escalation protocol template instead of normal dispatch.
